urdu transliteration text: Do bar namaz shaheed hui, ik Masjid mein ik maktal mein,
english translation text:
The prayer was martyred on two occasions,
Once in the mosque once in the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Quran lahu main tar dekha, ik Kufay mein ik Karbal mein
Once in Kufa once in Karbala
english translation text: Quran was seen afloat in the blood,

urdu transliteration text: Do bar namaz shaheed hui, ik Masjid mein ik maktal mein,
english translation text:
The prayer was martyred on two occasions,
Once in the mosque once in the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Ik bar yateem hoi bibi, ik bar hoti mutajarda,
First, Bibi was orphaned in Kufa,
english translation text: then was desperate for a veil in Karbala

urdu transliteration text: Do bar Nabi ka ghar ujra, ik basti mein ik jangal mein
english translation text:
The house of the prophet was displaced,
Once in the public once in the jungle

urdu transliteration text: Do bar namaz shaheed hui, ik Masjid mein ik maktal mein,
english translation text:
The prayer was martyred on two occasions,
Once in the mosque once in the battlefield

urdu transliteration text: Ghurbat mein yoon majboor kiya baiass Batool ki baiti ko,
english translation text:
In a strange place, they were made helpless
To the daughter of Batul without hope

urdu transliteration text:
Do bar Madina yaad aaya, Ik zinda mein ik mehwal mein
Madina was remembered twice,
english translation text: Once in the prison once on the camel’s saddle

urdu transliteration text: Do bar namaz shaheed hui, ik Masjid mein ik maktal mein,
english translation text:
The prayer was martyred on two occasions,
Once in the mosque once in the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Huway zakhmi kaan Masuma kay, pamal Hussain ki laash hoi,
Templed was Husayn’s body
english translation text: The ears of Masuma were bruised,

urdu transliteration text:
Do bar qiyamat tout pari, Ik khaimoon pay ik maktal mein.
Qayamat occurred on two occasions
english translation text: Once on the campsite once in the battle ground

urdu transliteration text: Do bar namaz shaheed hui, ik Masjid mein ik maktal mein,
english translation text:
The prayer was martyred on two occasions,
Once in the mosque once in the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Kuch paak namazi katal huey, teer o talwaroon say Muhsin,
A few pure worshippers got killed
Kuch zindanoon mein dafan huey, pardesi qaid musalsal mein
english translation text:
Some were buried in the prisons
In a strange jail

urdu transliteration text: Do bar namaz shaheed hui, ik Masjid mein ik maktal mein,
english translation text:
The prayer was martyred on two occasions,
Once in the mosque (and) once in the battlefield
